arts.ttl: “One of the finest” | Could Kudus’ solo strike land the Hammer the Puskas award?
arts.sum: West Ham star Mohammed Kudus has been nominated for the Puskas award, but what are his chances of winning it? Mohammed Kudus’ solo goal against Freiburg may seem like an eternity ago, but it was actually scored in 2024. The Ghanaian picked up the ball in his own half, using equal parts pace and skill... arts.ttl: “Bold strategy” | West Ham manager’s bold tactical switch could cause problems
arts.sum: Julen Lopetegui’s plan to drop big Summer signing could be disastrous. After conceding an awful amount of goals under David Moyes last season, the big thing fans wanted to see improve under Julen Lopetegui was the defence. Unfortunately, things didn’t improve much under the Spaniard at first, but two consecutive clean sheets suggests that things... arts.sum: Arsenal remain nine points and three places adrift of Liverpool after just 12 games but Mikel Arteta believes that their Premier League title hopes are still well and truly alive

arts.ttl: I signed for Arsenal from West Ham - there’s one thing I will never get used to
arts.sum: Speaking to ESPN earlier this year, Rice recalled his feelings of playing, and scoring against West Ham. Arsenal midfielder Declan Rice may now be in his second season at the club, but he still finds it ‘odd’ coming up against former side West Ham United.

arts.ttl: How Kylian Mbappe could impact future Arsenal transfer following £37m 'interest'
arts.sum: It has been claimed that the Frenchman's move to Madrid has caused tactical issues and further reduced playing time of up-and-coming talents Endrick and Guler. Arsenal could be placed on red-alert over the availability of Real Madrid prospect Arda Guler as the Turkish starlet reportedly grows unhappy with his lack of playing time.
